name: read_schematic
full_help:
read_schematic

Description: 
Import schematic 

Syntax: 
read_schematic  [-name <arg>] [-quiet] [-verbose] <file>

Returns: 
name of the file previously exported

Usage: 
  Name        Description
  -----------------------
  [-name]     Schematic window title
  [-quiet]    Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]  Suspend message limits during command execution
  <file>      Input file

Categories: 
FileIO

arguments.description: Suspend message limits during command execution
